{{Infobox artifact
| name = Hanging Tree seed
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The seed of a [[Hanging Tree]] is an oblong red ball about the size of a walnut.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|There is a seed to the [[Hanging Tree]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Hanging Tree seed]] is one of the only things that can send [[Incarnations]] back to their prison, other than another [[Ragnarus Traveler]] or their own foolishness.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Where is the seed to the Hanging Tree?”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
